backstory.original: Merilwen is the Wood Elf Druid with a penchant for puns and powerful spells. Her trusty bow can help her out of many a tough situation, but she finds that turning into a cat can be just as useful. Oh and she might look cute, but don't underestimate her; fiercely loyal to her friends, and to nature itself, she'll call upon the moon to deal with anyone who gets on her bad side. And if you're really unlucky, you might stumble into Merilwen's Meatgrinder. Spoilers: it's a very bad time.
backstory.display: 梅尔文是木精灵德鲁伊，对双关的俏皮话和强大的法术情有独钟。她可靠的弓箭能够帮她摆脱许多艰难的处境，但她发现变成一只猫也同样有用。哦对了，尽管可能看起来很可爱，但请不要小看她。她对朋友和大自然本身非常忠诚，会召唤月亮来对付任何惹毛她的人。如果你真的很不走运，你可能会踏进梅尔文的绞肉机。提前警告：那会是非常糟糕的时光。

description.original: Merilwen attacks a random enemy with a magical spray of poison.
description.display: 梅尔文用带有魔力的毒液喷溅攻击一名随机敌人。

longDescription.original: Merilwen attacks a random enemy with a magical spray of poison.
longDescription.display: 梅尔文用带有魔力的毒液喷溅攻击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Stone spikes come out of the ground, enemies take massive damage over time while in the area.
description.display: 石刺从地下钻出，随着时间推移，在该区域内的敌人将受到大量伤害。

longDescription.original: Stone spikes come out of the ground with a 30 second duration. Enemies take massive damage over time while in the area.
longDescription.display: 石刺从地下钻出，持续 30 秒。随着时间推移，在该区域内的敌人将受到大量伤害。

description.original: Merilwen enters every area in her Scottish Wild Cat form increasing the speed of adjacent champions
description.display: 梅尔文以苏格兰野猫形态进入每个区域，并提高相邻勇士的攻击速度

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions in the formation by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)使阵型中所有中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Merilwen buffs the damage of all Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions
tipText.display: 梅尔文能提高所有中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases gold find by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Oxventurers Guild Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位公牛冒险公会勇士，$(source_hero) 使金币寻获率提高 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。

At the start of each non-boss area, $(source_hero) takes on the form of a wild cat. She no longer makes normal attacks, but the attack speed cooldown of every adjacent Champion is reduced by $(amount) seconds. If there are ever $(monster_limit___2) or more enemies on the screen, $(source_hero) transforms back to her normal form and starts attacking until the party switches areas.
在每个非首领区域的开始处，$(source_hero)以野猫的形态出现。她不再发动普通攻击，但每个相邻勇士的攻击速度冷却时间减少 $(amount) 秒。如果屏幕上的敌人超出 $(monster_limit___2) 个，则$(source_hero)变回普通形态并开始攻击，直到队伍切换区域。

tipText.original: Merilwen transforms into a cat if there aren't enough enemies around to defeat, this speeds up the attack cooldown of adjacent Champions
tipText.display: 如果周围没有足够的敌人可供她击败，梅尔文就会变成一只猫，并加快相邻勇士的攻击冷却时间

description.desc: While in her elf form, $(source_hero) boosts A Neutral Party by $(amount)% for each enemy on the screen, stacking additively.
在精灵形态下，屏幕上每有一个敌人，$(source_hero)使“中立勇士的派对”的伤害提高 $(amount)%（加算）。
$(source_hero)'s normal attack makes hit enemies stink like skunk, taking $(seconds_of_bud) seconds of BUD damage every second for $(total_seconds) seconds.

effect_keys.dev_note: any changes to balance here will need to be be made in the attack def as well, these properties were just broken out to allow for easier post-translation changes to the description.

description.desc: $(source_hero)的普通攻击会使被命中的敌人散发出难闻的臭味，在 $(total_seconds) 秒内每秒受到等同于 $(seconds_of_bud) 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。

effect_keys.dev_note: any changes to balance here will need to be be made in the attack def as well, these properties were just broken out to allow for easier post-translation changes to the description.

specializationDescription.original: Merilwen focuses on her stinky enemies
specializationDescription.display: 梅尔文专注于她恶臭的敌人

description.desc: $(source_hero) gains an Encouragement stack each second that an enemy is not defeated, capping at $(max_stacks) stacks. For each Encouragement stack, the gold find of Liquidity is increased by $(amount)%, stacking additively. When an enemy is defeated or the party changes areas, the stacks are reset to 0.
每有一个敌人被$(source_hero)攻击但未死亡，她将每秒获得 1 层“鼓舞”堆叠，最多可获得 $(max_stacks) 层。每有一层“鼓舞”堆叠层数，“液态”提供的金币寻获加成提高 $(amount)%（加算）。每当有敌人被击败或队伍切换区域时，堆叠层数重置为 0。

specializationDescription.original: Merilwen focuses on her beloved friends
specializationDescription.display: 梅尔文专注于她挚爱的朋友

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s Wild Shape attack speed cooldown reduction is increased by $(amount) second and persists when she is in her elf form.
$(source_hero)的“自然变身”攻击冷却时间减免效果提高 $(amount) 秒，且她在精灵状态下时也会持续生效。

specializationDescription.original: Merilwen focuses on her cat form bonuses
specializationDescription.display: 梅尔文专注于她的猫形态加成

conditions.desc: When $target uses Merilwen's Meat Grinder Secondary effects are triggered based on if other Oxventurers Guild members are part of the formation.^^Corazón: Enemies affected by Grease in the spike area take $(corazon_amount___2)% damage from all sources.^Dob: Dob increases the number of Deposit stacks by 1%, rounding up, minimum 1 stack.^Egbert: Egbert's Atone for the Past is buffed by 1000%^Prudence: Prudence's Glee stacks are set to maximum.^Rust: Gold find is increased by $(rust_amount___2)% while the Meat Grinder is active.

当$target使用“梅尔文的绞肉机”时，如果阵型中还有其他公牛冒险公会成员，还会触发额外效果。^^科拉松：在尖刺区域受“油污”影响的敌人受到的所有伤害提高 $(corazon_amount___2)%。^多比：多比使“押金”的堆叠层数增加 1% 并四舍五入，最少 1 层。^艾伯特：艾伯特的“过去的赎罪”强化1000%。^普鲁登斯：普鲁登斯的“欢欣”直接叠加至满层。^拉斯特：绞肉机激活时，金币寻获量提高 $(rust_amount___2)%。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade_add_flat_amount,0.5,7995,0","description":"Additively increases the base attack cooldown reduction that $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) provides by $(seconds_plural amount)"}

description.original: As long as my friends are okay!
I let Corazon think he's in charge.
description.display: 我让科拉松认为是他在掌控一切。

description.original: Nature is neutral and so am I!

name.original: Isle in a Sea of Chaos

description.original: I keep my friends on track...or do they make me more chaotic?
description.display: 我让我的朋友们步入正轨......还是说，他们让我更加混乱？

name.original: Don't Put it in the Lake

description.original: The money is safer if I hold onto it.
I like animals better than people anyway.
description.display: 总之我喜欢动物胜过喜欢人。

effects.description: Additively increases the base attack cooldown reduction that $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) provides by $(seconds_plural amount)

description.original: I may be cute, but I will also turn into a bear and shred you.
description.display: 我可以很可爱，但也会变成熊撕碎你。

description.original: We'll just keep this gold safe and dry in the bag.
description.display: 我们会把这些金子安全地放在袋子里。

description.original: How did the halfling run so fast? He used his feats
description.display: 半身人为什么跑得这么快？因为他使出了浑身解数。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Merilwen is the Wood Elf Druid with a penchant for puns and powerful spells. Her trusty bow can help her out of many a tough situation, but she finds that turning into a cat can be just as useful. Oh and she might look cute, but don't underestimate her; fiercely loyal to her friends, and to nature itself, she'll call upon the moon to deal with anyone who gets on her bad side. And if you're really unlucky, you might stumble into Merilwen's Meatgrinder. Spoilers: it's a very bad time.
